title: Syracuse hosting two I-81 open houses this week
summary: The City of Syracuse is hosting two public open houses (November 12-13, 2025) as part of the Reconnecting Communities Planning Project to gather community feedback on draft street designs for five southside corridors and a proposed Linear Park following the I-81 Viaduct removal. This represents active community engagement on a major infrastructure and neighborhood reconnection initiative.

political_signal.description: Public investment in community input and transparency for major infrastructure project addressing equity and neighborhood reconnection on southside corridors.

processing_notes: Article date metadata shows 2025-11-12 but content references November 11-13 events; treating as future-scheduled event coverage
No specific budget or dollar amounts mentioned
Linear Park referenced as 'proposed' between Roesler and Wilson parks—may require GIS/planning cross-reference
Five southside corridors identified as focus area—aligns with equity/neighborhood revitalization themes
